subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These servants have hastened to the shadow of the Tree of Thy Covenant and have rushed forth unto the threshold of Thy sacred majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد سرعوا الی ظل شجره میثاقک و هرعوا الی عتبه قدس کبریائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @limits of the intellect, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation
